title: ProperProxyProtocol
description: Adds proxy protocol capabilities to your Minecraft server (that actually work). Also fixes TCPShield for modded servers.
body:
# Overview
This mod adds `Proxy Protocol` (or `HAProxy`) support to your Minecraft server. It also fixes TCPShield connections on your server!

# FAQ
**Q**: Does this affect performance?

**A** (Simple): No.

**A** (Full): No, this mod only reads connection packets and checks if they are using an HAProxy header. There is no hard operations happening. If anything, this should speed up logins as we patch players loading in to the world. We do this because the HAProxy handler handles connections on a different thread than the main server thread.


**Q**: Does this fix TCPShield connections?

**A** (Simple): Yes!

**A** (Full): Yes! You can actually turn `proxy-protocol` to `enabled` in your TCPShield panel and then your players' IPs will actually be parsed correctly by your server.

# Currently Supported
## Platforms
- NeoForge
- Fabric
- Forge

## Versions
- 1.21.11
- 1.21.1
- 1.20.1

# Requirements
`0` requirements!
